query: SELECT m.id AS memberId, m.accountId, a.name AS accountName, a.slug AS accountSlug, a.status AS accountStatus, m.role AS memberRole, m.isActive FROM account_members m INNER JOIN accounts a ON m.accountId = a.id WHERE m.userId = 901752 AND m.isActive = 1;
